name: code-scanner
description: Scans Python source code and extracts function/class metadata, signatures, and docstrings.

tools.name: scan_repository
tools.description: Walk a repository tree and extract metadata from all Python files.

target_name.description: Specific function or class name to filter by.

tools.name: resolve_dependencies
tools.description: Analyze imports and resolve internal vs external dependencies for a module.

file_path.description: Path to the Python file to analyze.
